title: unshare: fix unshare parses flags
body:
Fixes: #1374 

Fix buildah unshare parses flags when it shouldn't:

```
➜  cmd git:(unshare-fix) buildah unshare ls -l
unknown shorthand flag: 'l' in -l
```

After change:
```
➜  buildah git:(unshare-fix) ./buildah unshare ls -l
total 43028
-rw-rw-r-- 1 root root     8514 Feb 13 10:22 add.go
...
```

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body:
@q384566678 I already opened a PR for this https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1375
Could you review that one and we can get it merged.
